mapper.select: /* UsimOrgnPrdtRelMapper.usimOrgnList */ SELECT DISTINCT B.ORGN_ID , C.ORGN_NM FROM CMN_USG_GRP_ASGN_MST A , CMN_USR_MST B , ORG_ORGN_INFO_MST C WHERE A.USR_ID = B.USR_ID (+) AND B.ORGN_ID = C.ORGN_ID (+) AND B.USG_YN <> 'N' AND A.GRP_ID = 'G-PSCM2M' ORDER BY C.ORGN_NM

/* UsimOrgnPrdtRelMapper.usimPrdtRelList */ SELECT A.RPRS_PRDT_ID , A.PRDT_CODE , A.PRDT_NM , A.PRDT_DESC , A.OUT_UNIT_PRIC , A.OUT_UNIT_PRIC * 1.1 OUT_UNIT_PRIC_VAT , A.USE_YN , A.UNIT_PRIC_APPL_DTTM , A.UNIT_PRIC_EXPR_DTTM , A.IMG_FILE , A.ORG_IMG_FILE , FN_GET_USRNM(B.RVISN_ID) AS USR_NM , TO_CHAR(B.RVISN_DTTM,'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') RVISN_DTTM , B.ORGN_ID FROM MSP_M2M_MDL A ,MSP_M2M_ORGN_PRDT_REL B WHERE A.RPRS_PRDT_ID = B.RPRS_PRDT_ID AND B.ORGN_ID = #{orgnId, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ORDER BY A.RPRS_PRDT_ID
